title: Lamondre 30 Pcs Wet and Dry Sandpaper, Assorted 1000, 2000, 3000 Grits Abrasive Paper Sheets 9 x 3.6 Inches for Automotive Sanding, Wood Furniture Finishing, Wood Turning Finishing
features: Practical kit: 30 pieces sandpaper assortment in grit 1000/2000/3000 (10 sheets for each grit)
Easy to use: 22.8*9.14cm sanding paper, both manual polishing and place on sanding block are easily, and you can also cut these sandpaper to any size and shape on your demand
High quality: Made of waterproof silicon carbide, electroplating ensures evenly distributed gravel, suitable for dry/wet sanding, does not decompose, tear or break during use
Wet and dry: These sandpaper are made of silicon carbide material, super fine and evenly grit on the surface by nano-sand-planting techniques, can be used with water, varnish, shellac, lacquer or oil
Wide application: The sandpaper assortment is perfect for easy polishing and fine grinding of flat and silky texture polishing for metal, glass, plastic, stone, jade, leather, lacquer and wood
description: Sandpapers are widely applied in sanding, polishing, finishing, grinding, buffing. Sandpaper can be used on wood, metal, plastic, glass, painting, leather, lacquer, porcelain, walls, furniture, cars, jewelry, stone, woodcarving, art, crafts, woodworking, painting, automotive sanding, wood turning finishing, headlight refurbishment and much more. WHY CHOOSE Lamondre WET DRY SANDPAPER? √Premium silicon carbide - abrasion resistance, high efficiency and good effect. √Electro coated technology - grits are homogeneously distributed. √Tensile resistant sand paper - extremely sturdy and won’t fall apart or crumble off. √High quality, tear-resistant backing paper. √3 types of grits assortment - meet various sanding needs √The grits of the sandpaper are printed on the back - for easy identification. √Waterproof silicone carbide - great for dry and wet sanding. √The sanding block is easy to attach and remove sandpaper. PACKAGE INCLUDED 10 * 1000 grit sandpapers 10 * 2000 grit sandpapers 10 * 3000 grit sandpapers
